summary: Project Architecture Profile import now writes only the managed profile file under .opennori/architecture/profiles, and architecture/evidence is validated as apply-record-only state.

sources.label: ac-a-3-architecture-evidence-boundary
sources.summary: Architecture Baseline alignment context. This is not Product AC evidence by itself.

reviewability: Rerun npm run check, OpenNori self check, and doctor against the AW project with the misplaced .profile.json; inspect the profile import test and architecture evidence health test.
limitations: This verifies objective artifact boundaries and recovery surfacing; it does not make CLI judge whether a project Architecture Profile is subjectively good.
